title: Altinity SQL Browser saved-query Spec v1
description: The user-authored query.spec document. Saved-query envelope fields are intentionally outside this schema.

description.title: Description
description.description: Optional authoring note shown with the saved query.

favorite.title: Favorite
favorite.description: Whether the query is included in favorite-driven surfaces.

view.title: Preferred result view
view.description: The result representation restored when the saved query opens.

resultColumnIndex.title: Result column index
resultColumnIndex.description: Zero-based index of a ClickHouse result column.

deltaPresentation.title: Delta presentation
deltaPresentation.description: Display metadata for a runtime KPI delta value.

displayName.title: Delta label
displayName.description: Optional visible label for the delta.

unit.title: Delta unit
unit.description: Display-only suffix appended to the delta.

decimals.title: Delta decimal places
decimals.description: Requested display rounding for the delta.

positiveIsGood.title: Positive is good
positiveIsGood.description: Whether a positive runtime delta has good semantics.

show.title: Show delta
show.description: Whether a present runtime delta is rendered.

fieldConfigValue.title: Field presentation metadata
fieldConfigValue.description: Known presentation metadata for one result column. Unknown renderer extensions are retained.

decimals.title: Decimal places
decimals.description: Requested number of decimal places for numeric display.

description.title: Description
description.description: Supporting display text for the field.

unit.title: Unit
unit.description: Display-only suffix appended to the value.

color.title: Color
color.description: Theme token or CSS color hint interpreted by the renderer.

noValue.title: No-value text
noValue.description: Text shown for NULL or unavailable values.

hidden.title: Hidden
hidden.description: Suppress this otherwise eligible result field.

columns.title: Column overrides
columns.description: Display metadata keyed by exact result-column name.

dashboard.title: Dashboard configuration
dashboard.description: Dashboard participation metadata. Feature-specific extensions remain forward compatible.

role.title: Dashboard role (Panel, Filter, or Setup)
role.description: How the saved query participates in a dashboard. panel (the default) creates a visualization tile. filter returns exactly one row whose supported top-level Array, named Tuple Array, or Map columns provide option lists for parameters with the same exact names; it creates no tile and its SQL cannot declare parameters. setup is reserved for serialized Dashboard setup execution.

panel.title: Panel configuration
panel.description: Visualization and field metadata for the saved query.

key.title: Result schema key
key.description: Saved result-column signature used to detect stale positional roles.

y.title: Measure columns
y.description: One or more zero-based result-column indexes used as measures.

series.title: Series column
series.description: Optional zero-based result-column index used to split series.

panelCfg.title: Panel type configuration
panelCfg.description: Discriminated visualization configuration. Unknown types remain storable for forward compatibility.

oneOf.title: Column chart
oneOf.description: Vertical columns using positional X and measure roles.

oneOf.title: Horizontal bar chart
oneOf.description: Horizontal bars using positional X and measure roles.

oneOf.title: Line chart
oneOf.description: Line series using positional X and measure roles.

oneOf.title: Area chart
oneOf.description: Filled line series using positional X and measure roles.

oneOf.title: Pie chart
oneOf.description: Pie slices using one positional measure role.

oneOf.title: KPI
oneOf.description: One-row scalar and named-tuple KPI cards.

oneOf.title: Table
oneOf.description: Tabular result rendering with no required panel-specific fields.

oneOf.title: Logs
oneOf.description: Timestamped log messages with optional explicit result-column roles.

oneOf.title: Markdown text
oneOf.description: Safe Markdown content that does not require a SQL result.

content.title: Markdown content
content.description: Source text for the safe Markdown renderer.

oneOf.title: Future panel type
oneOf.description: Forward-compatible storage branch for a type implemented by a newer build.
